name: Australian United Investment Company Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 4% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$11.0000. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$10.9900, stop A$10.4148, target A$12.7156 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
